name: Ashura Doji
effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the type and your opponent has 3 or more Life cards, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 5 or less.

name: Izo
effect: [DON!! x2] This Character gains [Blocker]. [On Play] Your type Leader gains [Banish] during this turn.

name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
effect: [Your Turn] If you have 2 or less Life cards, your Leader gains +1000 power. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may return 2 total of your currently given DON!! cards to your cost area rested: This Character gains [Rush] and +1000 power during this turn. Land of Wano/Kouzuki Clan

name: Yamato
effect: [DON!! x2] [Your Turn] This Character gains +3000 power. [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order. PENEKOR
